creator: larse@isi.edu
text:
Hi,

I'm the security/ssh2 port maintainer. Could you please check if your PR 
(http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/19591) is still an 
issue with the latest version (3.2.2), and let me know?

I'm pretty clueless about the login issues you describe. Would you 
recommend adding your fix (add "UseLogin yes") to the default 
sshd_config installed by the port? Is there a downside?

Thanks,
Lars
-- 
Lars Eggert <larse@isi.edu>           USC Information Sciences Institute
